mapper.select: SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.display_name, g.name AS group_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN groups g ON u.group_id = g.id WHERE u.is_active = TRUE AND ( u.username ILIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' OR u.display_name ILIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' ) ORDER BY u.display_name ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT id FROM users WHERE is_active = TRUE AND (group_id = 2 OR role = 'admin')
